name: pi-basic-tools
description: Standalone core productivity tools for pi: apply_patch, repo_map, read_block, question, questionnaire, fetch, Sourcegraph, and built-in search activation. (todo split out into @tintinweb/pi-tasks.)

scripts.test:build: bun build extensions/apply-patch.ts extensions/fetch.ts extensions/enable-builtin-search.ts extensions/repo-map.ts extensions/read-block.ts extensions/question.ts extensions/questionnaire.ts extensions/sourcegraph.ts --target=node --external @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent --external @earendil-works/pi-ai --external @earendil-works/pi-tui --external @sinclair/typebox --outdir /tmp/pi-basic-tools-build
